title: Wholehearted Thanksgiving

verses.text: Thou, Lord, art a refuge for all the oppressed; all trust thee who knows thee, and trusting are blest; for never, O Lord, did thy mercy forsake the soul that has sought of thy grace to partake. Praise the Lord, praise the Lord, let the earth hear his voice! Praise the Lord, praise the Lord, let the people rejoice! O come to Jehovah, declare ye his fame, and give him all honour, for just is his name.

Give praise to Jehovah, the mighty deeds tell of him who has chosen in Zion to dwell, of him to whom justice and vengeance belong, who visits the lowly and overthrows wrong. Praise the Lord, praise the Lord, let the earth hear his voice! Praise the Lord, praise the Lord, let the people rejoice! O come to Jehovah, declare ye his fame, and give him all honour, for just is his name.

Behold my affliction, thy mercy accord, and back from death’s portals restore me, O Lord, that I in the gates of thy Zion may raise my song of salvation and show forth thy praise. Praise the Lord, praise the Lord, let the earth hear his voice! Praise the Lord, praise the Lord, let the people rejoice! O come to Jehovah, declare ye his fame, and give him all honour, for just is his name.
